infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TowCommand needs your location to find nearby tow trucks and track your service.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TowCommand needs background location to broadcast your position as a provider.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TowCommand needs camera access to capture vehicle condition photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TowCommand needs photo library access to upload vehicle photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TowCommand to use your location for provider tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow TowCommand to take photos for vehicle condition reports.
